'''âv-y-h-ng''' ('''kavayhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hocuspocus|hocuspocus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hocuspocus|hocuspocus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-y-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kavayhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivayhengoko|thivayhengoko]] || [[word:jivayhengoko|jivayhengoko]] || [[word:shivayhengoko|shivayhengoko]] || [[word:kivayhengoko|kivayhengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
